headline: Prediction: SpaceX Stock Could Crash by 50% by 2027
summary: Shares soared on their debut, but it probably won't last.

headline: PayPal Shutters Venture Arm, Explores Portfolio Sales Amid Corporate Overhaul
summary: PayPal Holdings Inc. is closing down PayPal Ventures, its decade-old corporate investing group. The unit’s staffing has dwindled to just two people, down from more than 10 late last year. PayPal has also been weighing secondary-market sales of some venture stakes and brought in Jefferies to advise on possible deals, according to Fortune. "As part of our continued efforts to sharpen our focus, we are exploring strategic options for our corporate venture capital arm, PayPal Ventures,” a PayPal spo
